description_long: This is a dark brown wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and a flat, overhanging top surface. The front side features three spacious drawers, each equipped with a sleek metallic handle for easy access. The cabinet sits on a slightly raised base, giving it a sturdy and grounded appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, suggesting a polished but matte finish. This type of cabinet is commonly used for storage in urban environments such as offices, garages, or residential interiors.
description: A dark brown wooden cabinet with three front drawers and metallic handles, featuring a flat top and a sturdy, raised base.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing three drawers with metallic handles and the overhanging top surface.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the drawers and handles, with the right side panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear-left view showing the plain back and left side, with no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view displaying the plain back and right side, emphasizing the solid construction.
